notes: Core Frogger mechanics are present but river collision detection is unreliable (frog dies even when visually on logs), the ROW_UI/ROW_START constants reference row 13-14 but canvas only has 650px (16.25 rows at 40px), causing layout miscalculations and the lives display overlapping incorrectly.

An exceptionally well-made Frogger clone with complete mechanics, grid-snapping from moving logs, diving turtles, audio synthesis, and proper level progression; only minor visual offset on the player sprite.
Core Frogger loop is mostly complete and stable, but level progression resets goals each level and several layout/gameplay inaccuracies keep it from feeling fully authentic or especially polished.
